title: Ad Astra Remastered
description: Ad Astra: Remastered enhances Ad Astra with more planets, Create mod integration, and QoL improvements. Enjoy optimized gameplay, better visuals, and a smoother space exploration experience.
body: Ad Astra Remastered is a modpack focused on optimizing Ad Astra, combining space exploration with performance improvements. Featuring expanded content through Dandi2k8's Ad Extender, Create ores on Ad Astra planets, and enhanced visuals with resource packs, it offers a refined and immersive experience for space survival and automation.
